subject: [PATCH v1 06/17] fuse: implement passthrough for getattr/statx

2026-04-20.patch_summary: This patch implements passthrough functionality for the getattr and statx operations in the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) kernel module. The patch allows the FUSE inode attributes to be updated directly from the backing inode's attributes, rather than relying on cached values. This is achieved by calling vfs_getattr() on the backing inode to respond to user requests for statx(2). The patch also introduces a new function fuse_kstat_to_attr() that converts kstat data into fuse_attr structures. The passthrough functionality is enabled by default and can be disabled using the no_statx mount option.
